# Projects

## Featured Projects

### ONT Methylation Pipeline
Scalable pipeline for long-read methylation analysis.

### [NGS Figure Generator](projects/seq-visualizer.qmd)
Interactive tool for generating publication-ready figures from high-throughput sequencing data, with customizable visualizations to highlight key biological insights.

### SARS-CoV-2 Evolutionary Analysis
Phylogenetic and evolutionary analysis of SARS-CoV-2.
